data.current_description: Search for destinations (cities) by keyword. Returns a list of matching destinations with basic information.
data.description_suggestion: Search for destinations (cities) by keyword query. Accepts a search parameter to filter destinations by name or related terms. Returns a JSON:API-formatted response containing a list of matching destinations with basic information including name, description, and related metadata. Results are ordered by relevance to the search query.

message: Operation 'autoCompleteDestinations' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Enhanced version clarifies the partial query input requirement, response format consistency, returned fields, ordering logic, and use case context to help AI agents understand when and how to invoke this operation versus the full search endpoint.

data.current_description: Get auto-complete suggestions for destination names. Useful for type-ahead search interfaces.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve auto-complete suggestions for destination names based on a partial input query. Designed for type-ahead search interfaces to provide real-time destination suggestions as users type. Accepts a query parameter with partial destination name and returns a JSON:API-formatted list of matching destination names and IDs ordered by relevance and popularity. Useful for building interactive search experiences.
